achievements.title: 猸?Fastest Grand Slam
achievements.description: Zhang Jike completed the Grand Slam in just 445 days, winning singles titles at the World Championships (2011), World Cup (2011), and Olympics (2012) 鈥?the fastest in history. Known for his fierce playing style and strong mental toughness, he was nicknamed 'Tibetan Mastiff'. At his peak, his dominance was extraordinary, winning two World Championships men's singles titles.
